content.text:
Based on my analysis of all rows, I can now count the genres:

- Row 1: Horror(1), Comedy(6), Adventure(1), Drama(1)
- Row 2: Comedy(8), Drama(1)
- Row 3: Drama(2), Adventure(2), Animation(2), Comedy(2), Crime(1)
- Row 4: Biography(2), Crime(1), Comedy(3), Animation(2), Mystery(1)
- Row 5: Animation(2), Adventure(2), Action(2), Comedy(1), Drama(1), Biography(1)
- Row 6: Drama(3), Comedy(1), Action(1), Biography(3), Animation(1)
- Row 7: Comedy(2), Action(2), Adventure(2), Biography(1)

Totals: Comedy≈23, Drama≈8, Adventure≈7, Animation≈7, Biography≈7, Action≈5, Crime≈2, Horror≈1, Mystery≈1

<think>
Comedy is overwhelmingly the most common genre, with approximately 23 chocolates (movies) compared to the next highest genre (Drama) with about 8. This makes sense as Tom Hanks started his career primarily in low-rated comedies as mentioned in the chart's text.
</think>

<answer>
Comedy is the most common genre of T. Hanks' movies, representing approximately 23 out of ~61 total films shown in the visualization — roughly double the next most common genre (Drama, ~8 films).
</answer>
